entries.title: The Faults of Others no Excuse for Evading the Claims of Christ
entries.text:
The Faults of Others no Excuse for Evading the Claims of Christ

Spurgeon, Charles Haddon

2 Samuel 12:14

However,, because by this deed you have given great occasion to the enemies of the LORD to blaspheme…

 

How can you make the excuse that because there are some hypocrites you will refuse Christ Himself? I heard a friend tell a good story in reference to that matter. An Irishman had found a sovereign which was short in weight, so that he could only get eighteen shillings for it. The next time he saw a sovereign lying on the ground he would not pick it up, for, he said, he had lost two shillings by the other.
